name: Alvarez & Marsal Holdings, LLC
h1: Alvarez & Marsal's GCC footprint in India
lede: Alvarez & Marsal runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. New Delhi and Bengaluru, covering gcc/gic and ssc, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alvarez & Marsal office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alvarez & Marsal GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alvarez & Marsal runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (New Delhi, Bengaluru), covering gcc/gic and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Managing Director and Head A&M India and Global Capability Centre

about.description: Alvarez & Marsal's India footprint covers New Delhi and Bengaluru, spanning gcc/gic and ssc. The centers deliver Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all nine decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Alvarez & Marsal operate in India?
faq.a: Alvarez & Marsal operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Alvarez & Marsal have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Alvarez & Marsal's India GCC footprint spans New Delhi and Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Alvarez & Marsal run in India?
faq.a: Alvarez & Marsal runs gcc/gic and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Alvarez & Marsal's India GCCs?
faq.a: Alvarez & Marsal's India centers employ in the 501 to 1,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Alvarez & Marsal's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 9 leaders at Alvarez & Marsal's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
